news.title: The Steam Controller's main competition isn't from Microsoft or Sony: It's from third-party vendors
news.titleEN: The Steam Controller's main competition isn't from Microsoft or Sony: It's from third-party vendors
news.desc: Long gone are the days when third party was for player two.
news.descEN: Long gone are the days when third party was for player two.

news.title: You can help save the whales by buying this reef-building game written by the scribe of the Tomb Raider reboot
news.titleEN: You can help save the whales by buying this reef-building game written by the scribe of the Tomb Raider reboot
news.desc: The developer of Life Below is launching a special supporter pack with all net revenue goes to supporting whale and dolphin conservation.
news.descEN: The developer of Life Below is launching a special supporter pack with all net revenue goes to supporting whale and dolphin conservation.

news.title: As it rapidly approaches $1 billion in player funding, Star Citizen goes free to play until May 27
news.titleEN: As it rapidly approaches $1 billion in player funding, Star Citizen goes free to play until May 27

news.title: The director of the best Splinter Cell game reckons that modern lighting engines are making stealth games 'so much harder to read'
news.titleEN: The director of the best Splinter Cell game reckons that modern lighting engines are making stealth games 'so much harder to read'
news.desc: "It gets very hard to tell what’s light, what’s shadow, what’s dark, what’s safe, what’s dangerous."
news.descEN: "It gets very hard to tell what’s light, what’s shadow, what’s dark, what’s safe, what’s dangerous."

news.title: Shock, tears, and relief: How Destiny 2's most popular creators reacted to the end of the legendary shooter
news.titleEN: Shock, tears, and relief: How Destiny 2's most popular creators reacted to the end of the legendary shooter
news.desc: "I thought I would be ready to hear something like this, but I guess I'm just not," said popular streamer Datto.
news.descEN: "I thought I would be ready to hear something like this, but I guess I'm just not," said popular streamer Datto.

news.title: Last Flag studio lays off half its employees as it puts 'the future of the game in the hands of our players'
news.titleEN: Last Flag studio lays off half its employees as it puts 'the future of the game in the hands of our players'
news.desc: Night Street Games said earlier this month that it will not be pursuing future development of its CTF shooter.
news.descEN: Night Street Games said earlier this month that it will not be pursuing future development of its CTF shooter.

news.title: Former Bungie dev says 'you'd be surprised how many times' expansions were pitched for a fan-favorite Destiny archvillain who's now left hanging

news.title: Fallout lead Tim Cain argues games industry crisis hasn't reached the level of the 1983 crash: 'I don't think there's ever been a worse time in the games industry'

news.desc: He doesn't want to diminish the current crisis, though.

news.title: Four years later, Microsoft finally finishes fighting over the Activision acquisition
news.titleEN: Four years later, Microsoft finally finishes fighting over the Activision acquisition
news.desc: A lawsuit suit, filed by Sjunde AP-Fonden, alleged that the buyout was rushed in order to protect Activision's then-CEO Bobby Kotick.
news.descEN: A lawsuit suit, filed by Sjunde AP-Fonden, alleged that the buyout was rushed in order to protect Activision's then-CEO Bobby Kotick.
